parameters.query:
INSERT INTO connector_health (tenant_id, connector, status, latency_ms, error_detail, checked_at)
VALUES ('$(tenant_id)', '$(connector)', '$(status)', $(latency_ms)::int, '$(error_detail)', '$(checked_at)')
ON CONFLICT (tenant_id, connector) DO UPDATE
SET status = EXCLUDED.status, latency_ms = EXCLUDED.latency_ms,
    error_detail = EXCLUDED.error_detail, checked_at = EXCLUDED.checked_at;

-- Retry failed delivery (Slack failed, now try email)
SELECT r.id, r.tenant_id, r.rec_type, r.data, r.priority, r.correlation_id,
       r.estimated_impact, r.why_recommended, r.delivery_attempts
FROM recommendations r
WHERE r.tenant_id = '$(TENANT_ID)'
  AND r.delivery_status = 'failed'
  AND r.delivery_attempts < 3
  AND r.priority IN ('CRITICAL', 'HIGH')
  AND r.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '48 hours'
LIMIT 5;

meta.description: Every 15 min: validate license → if valid: health check connectors + write heartbeat + retry failed deliveries. If invalid: alert + stop.
